limitation: Reuters states it was unclear whether every attacked ship was actually sailing under the U.S. scheme; industry sources were partly anonymous, and the accessible URL is a Reuters syndication mirror.
observation: Reuters reports from seven maritime-security and shipping-industry sources that companies were avoiding the U.S.-guided Omani transit route after attacks; five ships had been attacked in Omani waters associated with the scheme, nine Greek-operated LNG tankers were stuck, and some companies declined transit for crew-safety reasons.
